content:
The user wants me to count from 1 to 8 in one sentence. This is a simple request that doesn't require any tools. I should just provide the numbers from 1 to 8 in a single sentence.

Example: "I will count from 1 to 8: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight."

Or simply: "One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight."

Either works. I'll provide a natural sentence.
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight.
